pageTypes.name: blog-post
pageTypes.editableElements:
.vblog-2026__title:field(title:Title, name:title, type:string, order:1, section:Content, sectionOrder:1),
:field(title:Lead, name:lead, type:text, order:2, section:Content, options(layout:editor)),
.vblog-2026__hero img:field(title:'Hero image', name:image, type:image, order:3, section:Content),
.vblog-2026__body:field(title:Body, name:text, type:array, order:4, section:Content, options(layout:blocks)),
.vblog-2026__category:field(title:Category, name:category, type:string, col:6, section:Meta, sectionOrder:2, options(vocab:categories)),
:field(title:Author, name:author, type:string, col:6, section:Meta, options(vocab:authors)),
:field(title:'Author role', name:authorRole, type:string, col:6, section:Meta),
:field(title:Initial, name:initial, type:string, col:6, section:Meta),
.vblog-2026__readtime:field(title:'Read time', name:readTime, type:string, col:6, section:Meta),
:field(title:'Created at', name:createdAt, type:string, format:date, default:now, col:6, section:Meta, options(dateFormat:'MMMM D, YYYY')),
:field(title:Tags, name:tags, type:array, section:Meta, options(vocab:tags)),
.vblog-2026__related:readonly

content.lead: Det kommer att bli riktigt bra det här
content.title: Det här är den bästa bloggen jag har sett
content.author: Klar Klarsson
